data.title: Tesla sees sales increase in Europe, stock down 3% this week after testing support.
data.description: Last month, Tesla experienced a rise in new car registrations across multiple European countries. This positive trend comes as a boost amidst the stock's recent decline of around 3% this week. The company's sales in Europe are showing signs of recovery, reflecting a potential turnaround in their performance.

data.title: CrowdStrike stock fluctuated after beating Q4 earnings with fiscal 2027 guidance above expectations.
data.description: CrowdStrike's stock experienced fluctuations as investors considered the magnitude of a Q4 earnings surpass and fiscal 2027 guidance, which slightly exceeded expectations. The company's key metric was enhanced by the 'Falcon Flex' financing, contributing to overall growth.

data.title: Landsbankinn hf.'s Annual General Meeting set for March 18, 2026 at Reykjastræti 6, Reykjavík at 16:00.
data.description: Landsbankinn hf. has announced that its Annual General Meeting is scheduled for Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 16:00. The meeting will take place at Reykjastræti 6, Reykjavík.

data.title: Avantus secures $300M financing from BBVA and CIBC for Kitt Solar & Energy Storage Project in Pinal County, Arizona.
data.description: Avantus recently secured a financing package exceeding $300 million from Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria (BBVA) and Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce, New York Branch (CIBC) for their Kitt Solar and Energy Storage Project, based in Pinal County, Arizona. The project includes a significant capacity of 100 MWac/130 MWdc of solar power and 400 MWh of energy storage. This funding encompasses various financial components such as construction support, a tax equity bridge loan, and letters of credit.

data.title: Bitcoin surged 5% despite Iran conflict; Goldman Sachs CEO surprised by market's calmness. Cumulative impacts may take weeks to digest.
data.description: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon expressed surprise at the calm market response to the Iran conflict, noting that it may take a couple of weeks for investors to fully comprehend the impact. Solomon highlighted the 5% surge in Bitcoin amidst the conflict. Speaking at a business summit in Sydney, he stated that the market's reaction seemed "benign" considering the gravity of the situation. Solomon mentioned that markets typically react minimally to geopolitical events unless they affect economic growth directly. He emphasized a cumulative effect of current events that could lead to a more significant market response. Solomon expressed concerns about the delayed reaction from investors. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global tariffs set to increase to 15% this week, predicts Treasury Secretary; rates to return to pre-ruling levels in five months.
data.description: According to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, the overall tariff rates, which saw a decrease following a recent Supreme Court decision, are expected to return to their original levels in the next five months.

data.title: Royal Cup Coffee and Tea from Birmingham, Alabama announces to acquire Farmer Brothers Coffee Co in a recent agreement.
data.description: Royal Cup Coffee and Tea, based in Birmingham, Alabama, has recently announced its agreement to acquire Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies in the coffee industry. Royal Cup Coffee and Tea will be taking over Farmer Brothers Coffee Co in a strategic move that will impact the market. This development involves a substantial financial transaction, although the exact numbers have not been disclosed. This acquisition is expected to bring about changes and opportunities in the coffee and tea sector, with both companies poised for growth and innovation following the agreement.

data.title: Bitcoin's response to Iran war news showcases its role as a real-time risk gauge with stock exchanges closed. #cryptocurrency #IranWar
data.description: The price of Bitcoin saw a significant change due to news of the conflict in Iran while traditional stock markets were not in operation. This demonstrates the increasing role of cryptocurrency as an instant indicator of broader economic risks. This highlights the growing acceptance and utilization of Bitcoin as a real-time measure of macroeconomic uncertainty.

data.title: Fortify Companies partners with Insurcomm and Rytech for large loss response, expanding disaster recovery nationwide.
data.description: Fortify Companies has expanded its national catastrophic disaster recovery capabilities by utilizing Insurcomm's specialized large loss team and the Rytech Restoration First-Response Network. This strategic partnership aims to provide coordinated and scalable services nationwide. The move, announced on March 4, 2026, will enhance Fortify Companies' disaster response efforts to better serve clients in need. With Insurcomm's expertise and Rytech's quick first-response network, the company is better positioned to address large-scale disasters effectively. This collaboration marks a significant step in improving disaster recovery operations, with Fortify Companies now equipped to deliver comprehensive support on a broader scale.

data.title: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) offers Quantum-Resilient Vertical Security Stack for quantum computing protection.
data.description: Today in Geneva, Switzerland, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) introduced its Quantum-Resilient Vertical Security Stack, designed to safeguard businesses working on quantum computers and infrastructures. This offering includes Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology hardware and software products. SEALSQ specializes in developing and selling these solutions and is now prepared to provide them to companies in the industry.

data.title: Willdan to expand and implement programs for Puget Sound Energy, offering technical support and energy-efficient solutions.
data.description: Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) has been chosen by Puget Sound Energy (PSE) for projects involving telecommunications and multifamily new construction programs, along with enhancing non-lighting technology options for commercial endeavors. As part of these programs, Willdan will offer technical guidance, energy-efficient solutions, software aid, and various professional services to clients. Furthermore, Willdan is set to provide software services to support the initiatives.
